name: eval
label: eval
description: Execute code in a configured runtime. Returns stdout and stderr. Available languages: {{availableLanguages}}. Default timeout: {{defaultTimeoutMs}}ms.{{maxTimeoutDescription}}
promptSnippet: Execute code in a configured runtime and return stdout and stderr.
promptGuidelines: Use `eval` for executing code snippets in supported runtimes like Node.js or Python.
The `language` argument must be one of the available configured languages.
By default, eval does not inherit environment variables; set `inheritEnv` only when the snippet needs the caller environment.

language.description: Runtime to execute the code with. Available configured languages: {{availableLanguages}}.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds. If omitted, defaults to {{defaultTimeoutMs}}ms.{{maxTimeoutDescription}}

path.description: Path where the code should run. Supports both relative and absolute paths. If omitted, the current working directory is used.

inheritEnv.description: Whether to inherit the caller environment. If omitted, defaults to false.
